context: Tests whether the agent correctly describes the spec submission workflow, including the required tool choices (mcp__github__* not gh CLI), the precise ordering of label application before PR creation, the correct PR label, commit message format, PR title format, and issue comment wording.

checklist.name: No gh CLI
checklist.description: Does NOT mention using the `gh` CLI for any GitHub remote operation (creating PR, applying labels, posting comments). All remote GitHub operations use `mcp__github__*` tools.

checklist.name: ai:planned before PR
checklist.description: Applies the `ai:planned` label to the source issue (via mcp__github__add_issue_labels or equivalent) BEFORE creating the PR or posting any issue comment — ordering must be explicit.

checklist.name: Commit message format
checklist.description: Commit message follows the pattern `docs(spec-NNN): draft <title> (closes #ISSUE_NUMBER on merge)` — all three components present.

checklist.name: PR title format
checklist.description: PR title follows the pattern `docs(spec-NNN): <title>` exactly.

checklist.name: PR body includes Open Questions
checklist.description: PR body includes the §Open Questions list (verbatim or clearly labelled as such).

checklist.name: PR body includes review-spec verdict
checklist.description: PR body mentions the review-spec verdict (pass/findings from the review-spec skill run).

checklist.name: PR body links to source issue
checklist.description: PR body contains a link to (or reference number of) the source issue.

checklist.name: ai:revise label on PR
checklist.description: Adds the `ai:revise` label to the newly created PR (via mcp__github__add_issue_labels).

checklist.name: Issue comment wording
checklist.description: Issue comment follows the pattern: 'Drafted SPEC-NNN — see PR #<n>. Please review the §Open Questions section.' — all three components present.

checklist.name: Spec index updated
checklist.description: Step includes updating docs/specs/README.md to add the new spec to the index table.

checklist.name: No implementation
checklist.description: Plan does NOT include any step to implement the feature (write code, run tests, merge the PR, etc.) — plan ends after the issue comment is posted.

checklist.name: git push uses CLI
checklist.description: Branch push uses `git push` (the git CLI), not an MCP tool.
